Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-1, a Delaware Statutory Trust(s).
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VALERIE HENDERSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $45,997.12
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $750.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $46,747.12
Judgment signed in open court.
